ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(RecordTypeId) ), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Solution_Engineering', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.Type, 'New Sale')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.Type, 'Upsell')) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Solution Engineering request can be created for New Sale and Upsell opportunities only
